rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and signal routing should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Guarantee statements should not be placed in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts must relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
